tasks.subject: Task 1: Add .github/workflows/codeql.yml
tasks.description:
CodeQL analyze workflow for javascript-typescript: push(main)/PR(no path filter)/weekly schedule; analyze job with security-events:write + actions:read; checkout -> init(languages: javascript-typescript) -> analyze(category /language:javascript-typescript); no npm/build; codeql-action pinned to 84498526a009a99c875e83ef4821a8ba52de7c22.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/codeql.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml;yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/codeql.yml'))\" && grep -c 84498526a009a99c875e83ef4821a8ba52de7c22 .github/workflows/codeql.yml", "spec": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-codeql-jsts-design.md"}
```
